summary: Implementation review accepts Core admission binding to real Harbor identity/runtime refs and Lode Xiaohongshu/BOSS package locks for Core #220/#221/#222/#223/#224.
reviewed_validation_summary: `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/core-runtime test`; `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/schemas test`; `pnpm conformance`; `pnpm typecheck`; `git diff --check`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom suite validate --target . --item CORE-221 --json`; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item CORE-221 --json`; `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item CORE-221 --json` passed locally.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: Core consumes only Harbor public refs/status facts and Lode package locks/resource requirements, and preserves the boundary that live browser material and private payloads are rejected before Run Record persistence.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The implementation adds targeted admission checks and self-check coverage for provider status, identity/runtime matching, resource fact matching, package lock admission, evidence refs, and private material rejection without touching App/Harbor/Lode runtime code or executing live sites.
